prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: unlock and achievement VFX sheet for Orbwalker
Primary request: create an opaque chroma-key source sprite sheet for meta unlock and achievement celebration feedback.
Subject: ten compact VFX sprites in a 5x2 grid: unlock burst, achievement sparkle, relic reveal flare, mastery unlock ring, star pop, progress pulse, reward beam, celebratory trail, soft toast shimmer, coin-glint burst.
Style/medium: polished stylized 2D game VFX sprites with crisp mobile readability.
Composition/framing: centered sprites with consistent padding in equal cells.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid cyan background #00FFFF only.
Color palette: gold, white, warm amber, violet accents, teal accents allowed except key cyan.
Constraints: exact one-color #00FFFF background; no checkerboard; no gradient; no texture; no shadows, glow, smoke, or particles touching background; no panel/frame/matte backdrop; no text; no watermark.
Avoid: absolutely no #00FFFF or near-cyan tones inside the VFX artwork.
notes: Opaque chroma-key fallback source candidate only; deterministic keyed-alpha extraction required before promotion.
